overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist riding a mechanical Sunwing mount through diverse terrain including snow-capped mountains, misty redwood forests, tropical coastlines, and ancient ruins. The camera follows in smooth third-person perspective as the mount banks and dives through the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude mountain peaks with snow

agents.ego_description: flying on a mechanical Sunwing mount over rocky mountain terrain, descending toward forest valley

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance against blue sky
jagged rock formations passing by on the right side
scattered bushes and small trees on mountain slopes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude flight over rugged mountain terrain. Snow-capped peaks dominate the distant horizon while rocky cliffs pass by on the right. The mechanical mount glides smoothly above sparse alpine vegetation as it descends toward a forested valley below.

events.description: descending from open mountain air into dense forest tree canopy
entering misty area between tall trees, light becomes diffused

agents.ego_description: navigating the Sunwing downward through tall pine trees, weaving between trunks in the mist

entered.detail: massive redwood-style trees with thick trunks flanking the flight path
atmospheric fog settled between the tree trunks
dense layer of green foliage forming the forest ceiling

segments.scene_description: The mount descends into a dense redwood forest, transitioning from open sky to a semi-enclosed space. Tall pine trees flank both sides as mist filters through the canopy, diffusing the sunlight. The camera weaves between massive tree trunks while the forest canopy spreads out below.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient forest with coastal view opening

events.description: location discovery text appears identifying Rebel Outpost ahead

agents.ego_description: flying through forest canopy, banking between trees while approaching coastal cliffs

entered.detail: stone structures perched on distant cliff edges
blue ocean becoming visible through gaps in the trees

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the forest at canopy level, the mist clears revealing brighter lighting. The trees spread out to the distance as the flight path approaches the forest edge. Ancient stone ruins become visible on distant cliffs to the right, and glimpses of blue ocean water appear ahead as the location discovery triggers.

events.description: exiting forest to reveal open coastal landscape with ocean and beaches

agents.ego_description: flying along the coastline, banking left to follow the shore while ancient ruins pass by on the right

entered.detail: sandy beach with turquoise water lapping at the shore
rocky cliffs and peaks rising behind the coastline
large circular ancient fortress structure on the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up dramatically as the forest gives way to a stunning tropical coastline. Turquoise ocean stretches to the left with sandy beaches, while coastal mountains rise in the distance. The camera banks along the shore, passing closer to ancient stone structures on the right while a large circular ruin complex becomes visible ahead over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient flooded ruins with wooden scaffolding

events.description: descending sharply toward the water surface and ruin entrance

agents.ego_description: diving down toward the circular ruins, slowing down to approach the water-level entrance

entered.detail: weathered stone walls of the ancient structure flanking the approach
wooden platforms and beams attached to the stone ruins
large arched doorway leading into the central structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a sharp descent toward the ancient circular ruins built over calm water. Stone walls with wooden scaffolding flank both sides as the mount slows down. The camera approaches a large arched entrance to the central structure, with mist hovering over the water surface, creating a mysterious atmosphere around the ruined fortress.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight that descends from frozen mountain peaks through a misty forest and finally opens onto a tropical coastal ruin. It begins with a high-altitude glide over rugged, snow-capped mountains and rocky cliffs before diving toward a forested valley below. As the mount enters a dense redwood forest, the open sky is replaced by a semi-enclosed canopy where sunlight filters through thick mist and massive tree trunks. The scene then expands as the mist clears and the trees thin, revealing ancient stone ruins on distant cliffs and the first glimpses of a blue ocean. Finally, the forest gives way to a dramatic tropical coastline of turquoise water and sandy beaches, with the camera banking along the shore before making a sharp descent toward a mysterious circular fortress built over the water.
